title: 12th Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''12th Squadron''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starfighter squadron operating some time after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
12th Squadron served onboard the ''[[Assiduous]]'' at the behest of [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Valin Draco]]. They were one of the first Imperial squadrons to switch from [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|V-wing starfighters]] to [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. The 12th participated in a [[Battle of Bespin (Imperial Period)|battle]] above Bespin.

==Appearances==
*{{DoD|The Queen of Air and Darkness}}
